title: Medieval Defense Turrets
description: This mod adds medieval-inspired turrets to defend your base
body:
This mod adds turrets that you can craft and put arround your base to defend it from those pesky monsters or alternatively other players. be careful and protect your turrets though as mobs may also be able to use them against you!


**Requires Geckolib!**

**Note: if you experience crashes when updating, make sure to check the changelogs for any config changes, if those exist delete your config file and let the game create a new one. For some reason that can sometimes cause crashes**

Also check this mod out on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/medieval-defense-turrets)

# FEATURES



Note: All the turrets in the mod are generally shot by right clicking when you are riding them. ammo is loaded by right clicking on the turret with the ammo on hand (shift can be held as to not repetedly ride them)



**_Bow turret_**

_"Why carry a bow when you can strap it from a pole and shoot it from a chair?" - Me, literally right now_



The bow turret is the most basic of all the turrets added by these mods and as such the easiest and most simple to craft, its ammo type is arrows.



**_Catapult_**

_"Why shoot arrow when big rock go boom?" - Sun tzu, art of war_


The catapult is the second most basic turret in the mod, and as expected shoots rocks that produce a large area of effect explosion upon landing, its ammo type is cobblestone.

**_Hwacha_**

The hwacha turret fires a large volley of arrows that deal low damage but set targets on fire, its especially designed as a crowd control turret capable of dealing decent damage over time on a large crowd of enemies, it uses arrows as ammo however due to its volley-fire nature each arrow counts as 10 shots for the hwacha for balancing reasons as to not make it too expensive to shoot. 




**_Cannon_**


The cannon operates rather differently than most of the other turrets. The block to its side is known as the amethyst target, 

When powered by redstone, the amethyst target will send a vibration towards all nearby cannons and prompt them to automatically look and fire, the cannons ammo is cannonballs and will not fire if they dont have any ammo. 

The proyectile has high dropoff when fired by the cannon, and the cannons do not automatically account for it. A player can adjust the cannons firing angle by right clicking / shift right clicking the target (amethyst target block) which the cannon will be firing towards (do note, the amethyst target will always force the closest cannon to fire.) with an amethyst shard on hand. 


**_Orbital Cannon_**



_"The medieval people loved their obital cannons" Source: Trust me._



The orbital cannon is the most powerful and most different turret in all of the mod as it can shoot with infinite range at anywhere in the world when given the appropiate coordinates, when right clicking the orbitall cannon, a GUI will open.


On the appropiate slots, put a paper renamed with the coordinates you want the cannon to shoot at. and on the red slot the payload to fire (TNT). Pressing the shoot button will make the cannon fire towards the designed coordinates, when firing account for the fact that the tnt will be fired from above and fall down on the target.




_Wrench_



Although not a turret, the wrench can be used to both repair damaged turrets (right click) or disassemble them (left click). A turret that is destroyed via any means that isnt the wrench will be destroyed permanently, 


<details>
<summary>New Features</summary>

_Nether altar_

The nether altar is a hellish turret capable of summoning ghast fireballs stationary above it for the player to punch and aim as they will, the altar will not create a new fireball if there is one already remaining above it. Its ammo is fire charges


</details>


# Special Thanks 


Special thanks to the team over at [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for allowing me to create all of my mods.





# Dependancies


Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)







If you want to support me, you may donate to my [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magythemage) page, any kind of support is welcome but not necesary.
